title: L-System Fractal Designer
description: Grammar-based fractal generator with 9 presets, live rule editing, 5 color modes, animated drawing, and SVG/PNG export.
concept: L-systems are formal grammars that expand a seed axiom through rewriting rules, producing stunning self-similar fractals. This designer lets you craft the exact grammar that generates Barnsley ferns, Koch snowflakes, dragon curves, Hilbert space-fillers, and more — or invent your own. Tweak angle, iterations, and color mode to see entirely different structures emerge from the same rules.
features: 9 built-in presets: Koch Snowflake, Sierpinski, Dragon Curve, Barnsley Fern, Bush, Binary Tree, Hilbert, Gosper, Crystal
Live rule editor with axiom + production rules textarea (format: F=F+F--F+F)
5 color modes: Depth gradient, Rainbow, Solid, Fire palette, Forest palette
Animated drawing mode with configurable speed slider
Pan + zoom canvas (scroll, drag, touch pinch-zoom)
PNG and SVG export (color-accurate vector output)
URL hash sharing — full config encoded in shareable link
3 localStorage save slots — right-click to save, click to load

interaction.mouse: Drag to pan the fractal canvas
interaction.click: Click presets to load; click ▶ button to animate; right-click save slots to save
interaction.touch: Drag to pan; pinch to zoom
interaction.keyboard: Edit axiom and rules in text fields
